description: W1 real pilot-scope golden question set for joblogic-kb/api-docs. Questions target specific sections of real markdown documents currently ingested in the agentopia-dev Qdrant cluster. Relevance labels are source-level because chunk_index depends on chunking strategy.

grading_scale.0: irrelevant — chunk has no useful information for the query
grading_scale.1: partially relevant — chunk contains related but incomplete information
grading_scale.2: fully relevant — chunk directly answers or substantially addresses the query

pilot_source: agentopia-dev Qdrant cluster, 258 chunks across 10 markdown documents
label_strategy: source-level: relevance grade assigned per source document. Chunks from the labeled source are graded relevant; others are irrelevant. This allows fair comparison across chunking strategies that produce different chunk counts.
labeling_status: DRAFT — labels created from document heading analysis. Requires CTO review before use as authoritative gate evidence.
wave: W1 real pilot — 10 queries against joblogic-kb/api-docs production scope

samples.query: What are the core services in the Agentopia platform architecture?

relevant_sources.reason: Core Services section (H3) directly lists and describes all services

samples.query: How does bot provisioning work and how are credentials secured?

relevant_sources.reason: Bot Provisioning + Token Security sections describe the full pipeline and credential storage

samples.query: What is the memory architecture and how does scope-based isolation work?

relevant_sources.reason: Memory Architecture section describes three-layer system; Scope-Based Isolation subsection explains bot grouping
Related multi-bot architecture with scope details

samples.query: How does the governed PR review workflow operate end-to-end?

relevant_sources.reason: How It Works section describes 6-step process; Architecture Summary provides plane separation

samples.query: What is the dual-lane interaction model and what are the execution boundaries?

relevant_sources.reason: Dual-Lane Interaction Model section describes communication vs workflow lanes; Execution Boundaries section lists the three boundaries

samples.query: How do agents communicate using the A2A thread model?

relevant_sources.reason: Thread Model section describes state machine, epoch summaries, turn protocol, session isolation

samples.query: What is the SA Knowledge Base and how does it inject context at inference time?

relevant_sources.reason: SA Knowledge Base section describes gateway plugin, scope resolution, XML injection, citation contract
Full production spec with D3 outcome (runtime retrieval architecture)

samples.query: What are the production acceptance criteria for the SA Knowledge Base?

relevant_sources.reason: Section 10: Production Acceptance Criteria lists 8 criteria including citation, isolation, quality threshold

samples.query: What human-in-the-loop controls exist in the A2A collaboration system?

relevant_sources.reason: Human-in-the-Loop section describes checkpoints, approval flow, and guidance mechanisms

samples.query: What is the reviewer bot's scope of permissions and what can it not do?

relevant_sources.reason: Reviewer Bot section + What This Is Not section describe scoped permissions and explicit limitations
